zh.lifeSummary: 當Cadwaladr ap Gruffudd於大約1099年出生在威爾士凱爾納方史爾時，他的父親King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys45歲，母親Angharad ferch Owain35歲。他於1129年與Alice Clare在威爾士安格萊阿福拉福 卡素結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他於1141年登記服兵役。他去世於1172年3月在英國威爾斯凱爾納方史爾班格爾享年74歲，埋葬在威爾士凱爾納方史爾班格爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cadwaladr ap Gruffudd于大约1099年出生在威尔士凱爾納方史爾时，他的父亲King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys45岁，母亲Angharad ferch Owain35岁。他于1129年与Alice Clare在威尔士安格萊阿福拉福 卡素结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他于1141年登记服兵役。他去世于1172年3月在英国威尔斯凱爾納方史爾班格爾享年74岁，埋葬在威尔士凱爾納方史爾班格爾。

nameMeanings.name: Gruffudd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Griffith
meanings: Welsh (Carmarthenshire and western England): from the Old Welsh personal name Gruffudd, Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, composed of the elements grip, of uncertain significance, + iud ‘chief, lord’.

nameMeanings.name: Cadwaladr
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Ancient Celtic name composed of cad ‘battle’ + gwaladr ‘leader’, commonly given to the sons of kings and princes. St Cadwaladr was killed while maintaining a stronghold against the invading Saxons in the 7th century.

variants.name: Cadwalader
meanings: Ancient Celtic name composed of cad ‘battle’ + gwaladr ‘leader’, commonly given to the sons of kings and princes. St Cadwaladr was killed while maintaining a stronghold against the invading Saxons in the 7th century.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

en.lifeSummary: When Cadwaladr ap Gruffudd was born about 1099, in Caernarfonshire, Wales, his father, King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys, was 45 and his mother, Angharad ferch Owain, was 35. He married Alice Clare in 1129, in Aberffraw Castle, Anglesey, Wales. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He registered for military service in 1141. He died in March 1172, in Bangor, Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 74, and was buried in Bangor, Caernarfonshire, Wales.

fr.Bangor, Caernarvonshire, , Wales: Bangor, Caernarfonshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cadwaladr ap Gruffudd est né environ 1099, à Caernarfonshire, Galles, son père, King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Angharad ferch Owain, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Alice Clare en 1129, à Aberffraw Castle, Anglesey, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1141. Il est décédé en mars 1172, à Bangor, Caernarfonshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterré à Bangor, Caernarfonshire, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cadwaladr ap Gruffudd um 1099 in Caernarfonshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys 45 und seine Mutter Angharad ferch Owain 35. Er hat 1129 in Aberffraw Castle, Anglesey, Wales Alice Clare geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er hat sich 1141 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb im März 1172 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Bangor, Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Bangor, Caernarfonshire, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cadwaladr ap Gruffudd è nato il circa 1099 nel Caernarfonshire, Galles, il suo padre, King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Angharad ferch Owain, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Alice Clare nel 1129, nel Aberffraw Castle, Anglesey, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1141. Morì nel marzo 1172, nel Bangor, Caernarfonshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolto a Bangor, Caernarfonshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Cadwaladr ap Gruffuddが約1099年にウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアで生まれた時，父King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powysは45歳，母Angharad ferch Owainは35歳であった。1129年にウェールズアングレセイアバーフラウ カストルでAlice Clareと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1141年に兵役登録をした。彼は1172年3月にイギリスウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアバンゴルで74歳で死去し，ウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアバンゴルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Cadwaladr ap Gruffudd(이)가 대략 1099년 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Angharad ferch Owain(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1129년 웨일스 앤글레시 압르프롤 카스틀에서 Alice Clare(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1141년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1172년 3월 영국 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르 방어에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르 방어에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cadwaladr ap Gruffudd nasceu aproximadamente 1099, em Caernarfonshire, Gales, seu pai, King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Angharad ferch Owain, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Clare em 1129, em Aberffraw Castle, Anglesey, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1141. Ele faleceu em março de 1172, em Bangor, Caernarfonshire, Gales, United Kingdom, com 74 anos, e foi sepultado em Bangor, Caernarfonshire, Gales.

ro.Bangor, Caernarvonshire, , Wales: Bangor, Caernarfonshire, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cadwaladr ap Gruffudd родился около 1099 г. в местности каирнарфоншир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Angharad ferch Owain, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Clare в 1129 г. в местности абирффрав кастл, англеси, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. В 1141 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер марта 1172 г. в местности бангор, каирнарфоншир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 74 лет и был похоронен в местности бангор, каирнарфоншир, Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cadwaladr ap Gruffudd nació aproximadamente 1099, en Caernarfonshire, Gales, su papá, King Cynan Brochael Garwyn of Powys, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Angharad ferch Owain, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Alice Clare en 1129, en Aberffraw Castle, Isla Oscura, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1141. Murió en marzo de 1172, en Bangor, Caernarfonshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultado en Bangor, Caernarfonshire, Gales.
